subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath stitched the mantle of the glory of Thy sovereignty and the vestures of the sanctity of Thy Temple [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی خیط ردآء عز سلطنتک و اثواب قدس هیکلک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
